title: Book Of Nonsense Limerick 33.
content:
There was an Old Person whose habits,
    Induced him to feed upon Rabbits;
    When he'd eaten eighteen,
    He turned perfectly green,
    Upon which he relinquished those habits.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Edward Lear delivers a powerful performance in "Book Of Nonsense Limerick 33."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
